member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogPublishingModule.Data.Search.Indexing.ProductCompletenessChangesProvider
member.summary: Extend product indexation process. Invalidate products as changed when products completeness value updated.

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogPublishingModule.Data.Search.Indexing.ProductCompletenessDocumentBuilder
member.summary: Extend product indexation process and provides completeness_ChannelName field for indexed products

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogPublishingModule.Data.Services.Evaluation.DefaultCompletenessEvaluator
member.summary: Default completeness evaluator. Provides completeness for properties, descriptions, prices & seo by default

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogPublishingModule.Data.Services.Evaluation.DescriptionsCompletenessDetailEvaluator
member.summary: Descriptions valiator. Check that products have description per item description type per channel language, which content is not null or empty.

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogPublishingModule.Data.Services.Evaluation.PricesCompletenessDetailEvaluator
member.summary: Prices validator. Check that products have at least one price per channel currency, which list price is greater than zero.

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogPublishingModule.Data.Services.Evaluation.PropertiesCompletenessDetailEvaluator
T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogPublishingModule.Data.Services.Evaluation.SeoCompletenessDetailEvaluator
member.summary: Properties validator. Check that products have at least one SEO per channel language, URL keyword of which is not null or empty and does not contain invalid symbols (where invalid symbols is $+;=%{}[]|\/@ ~#!^*&?:'<>,)
